category_sources: source_facts.description says dnspyre is a CLI tool for a high-QPS DNS benchmark.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and official project homepage use dnspyre.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage points to the official project documentation site; official GitHub README is an additional documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has a value, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies high-QPS DNS benchmarking; source_facts.executables lists the dnspyre CLI.
